focus: maintainability of stale-reference concentration, runtime doc drift, and repair guidance after rename

findingDetails.title: Active skill catalog and benchmark defaults still publish the removed proposal-agent/YAML identity
findingDetails.evidence: Active feature-catalog docs still delegate candidate generation to `.opencode/agents/improve-agent.md`, list obsolete `deep_start-agent-improvement-loop_{auto,confirm}.yaml` workflow assets, and the default benchmark profile targets `.opencode/agents/improve-agent.md` even though the active agent inventory contains `deep-agent-improvement.md` instead.
findingDetails.recommendation: Update active feature-catalog pages, SKILL integration points, and benchmark profile defaults to the `deep-agent-improvement` agent/YAML names; rerun the old-name inventory outside `specs/` and `z_archive/` before marking maintainability complete.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Old proposal-agent/YAML references appear in feature catalog, SKILL integration docs, and default benchmark config beyond prior F001/F002 surfaces; `.opencode/agents/` inventory contains no `improve-agent.md`.

traceabilityChecks: Remaining stale references are broader than F001/F002 and require a same-class active-scope inventory pass.
OpenCode and Claude command docs use renamed YAML assets; Gemini command docs remain prior F001 drift.
Follow-on repair path is concrete but current packet ledgers remain misleading due to F003-F005.
Exact active old YAML/agent-path references were checked outside historical z_archive/spec archives.
edgeCases: Historical specs and z_archive references excluded unless active files rely on them as current evidence.
.claude/settings.local.json old move commands treated as local settings artifact, not active command/runtime docs in scope.
F006 excludes already-recorded Gemini and CP-041/CP-042 stale surfaces.
ruledOut: No duplicate F001 for Gemini YAML references.
No duplicate F002 for CP-041/CP-042 old cat commands.
No new P0 because evidence shows maintainability drift, not immediate exploitability or destructive data loss.

title: Active skill catalog and benchmark defaults still publish the removed proposal-agent/YAML identity
